entities.birdbath: a stone birdbath covered in ice
entities.robin: a small robin with a red breast

scenes.title: The Winter Garden
scenes.background_prompt: A wintry garden with bare trees, a wooden fence, dead brown leaves covering the ground, a small wooden shed in the corner, and frost on every surface. Overcast sky. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A wintry garden on an overcast day. A round stone birdbath stands in the center of the garden, its basin completely frozen over with a thick layer of translucent ice, and frost crystals forming delicate patterns on its pedestal. A small robin with a bright red breast and brown feathers perches on the top rail of a weathered wooden fence to the right, its head tilted as if listening. Dead brown and orange leaves cover the ground in thick patches. A small wooden shed with a green door stands in the far corner, its roof dusted with frost. Bare tree branches frame the scene above, and a few remaining brown leaves cling to the branches. The grass is stiff and pale with frost. The sky is a flat white-gray, and the overall atmosphere is still and cold.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place birdbath in the center of the garden, frozen over with a thick layer of ice and frost patterns on the pedestal. Place robin on the top rail of the wooden fence (right), perched with head tilted.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, clumps of frosted grass and clover-like leaves grow alongside dried, spindly seed heads. Moving across the foreground to the right, the ground is covered in a thick layer of brown, dried leaves, mostly oak-shaped, with patches of white frost and light snow scattered between them. On the far right of the foreground, more frosted grass and dried plants are visible. In the midground on the far left, a large, thick-trunked leafless tree with many twisting branches stands in front of a wooden picket fence. To its right is a smaller leafless tree. In the center of the yard, a light brown stone birdbath sits on a pedestal. The birdbath is covered in a thick layer of white snow and ice that forms several icicles hanging from its rim, and the water inside the basin is frozen. A robin is perched on the right edge of the birdbath, facing left; it has a brown back and wings, a bright orange-red breast, and a small dark eye. To the right of the birdbath stands another leafless tree. Further right, a small wooden garden shed features a snow-covered gabled roof, a brown door with a small four-pane window, and a larger four-pane window on its side. Bare, twiggy bushes are situated next to the shed. A wooden fence with vertical slats runs horizontally across the scene behind the trees and birdbath. Behind this fence, the tops of more bare trees are visible. The background consists of a pale blue sky filled with numerous soft, rounded white clouds, suggesting a cold, clear winter day.

a bird perched on the frozen birdbath

a yard filled with crunchy brown leaves
